svg_code:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 640 200">
  <defs>
    <style>
      @keyframes float {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
        50% { transform: translateY(-8px); }
      }
      @keyframes sway {
        0%, 100% { transform: rotate(-3deg); }
        50% { transform: rotate(3deg); }
      }
      @keyframes pulse {
        0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
        50% { transform: scale(1.05); opacity: 0.9; }
      }
      @keyframes drift {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0) translateY(0); }
        25% { transform: translateX(3px) translateY(-5px); }
        75% { transform: translateX(-3px) translateY(-3px); }
      }
      .flower-1 { animation: float 4s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .flower-2 { animation: float 4.5s ease-in-out infinite 0.5s; }
      .flower-3 { animation: float 3.8s ease-in-out infinite 1s; }
      .flower-4 { animation: float 5s ease-in-out infinite 0.3s; }
      .flower-5 { animation: float 4.2s ease-in-out infinite 0.8s; }
      .flower-6 { animation: drift 6s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .stem { transform-origin: top center; animation: sway 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .stem-2 { transform-origin: top center; animation: sway 3.5s ease-in-out infinite 0.5s; }
      .petal-pulse { animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; transform-origin: center; }
      .leaf-sway { animation: sway 4s ease-in-out infinite; transform-origin: bottom center; }
    </style>
    
    <!-- Poppy flower gradient -->
    <radialGradient id="poppyGrad" cx="30%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FF6B6B"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#E63946"/>
    </radialGradient>
    
    <!-- Tulip gradient -->
    <radialGradient id="tulipGrad" cx="30%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFB380"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#F77F00"/>
    </radialGradient>
    
    <!-- Purple flower gradient -->
    <radialGradient id="purpleGrad" cx="30%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#B88AE8"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#9B5DE5"/>
    </radialGradient>
    
    <!-- Blue flower gradient -->
    <radialGradient id="blueGrad" cx="30%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6FA8C5"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#457B9D"/>
    </radialGradient>
    
    <!-- Gold flower gradient -->
    <radialGradient id="goldGrad" cx="30%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFCF8A"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#F4A261"/>
    </radialGradient>
    
    <!-- Teal flower gradient -->
    <radialGradient id="tealGrad" cx="30%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5CBFB3"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2A9D8F"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="640" height="200" fill="#FFFEF5"/>
  
  <!-- Large coral poppy - left -->
  <g class="flower-1">
    <!-- Stem with balloon-string curve -->
    <path class="stem" d="M120 200 Q115 160, 125 130 Q130 110, 120 85" stroke="#7CB07C" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- Small leaf -->
    <ellipse class="leaf-sway" cx="128" cy="145" rx="8" ry="4" fill="#8FBC8F" transform="rotate(-30 128 145)"/>
    <!-- Flower head - round like balloon -->
    <circle cx="120" cy="55" r="32" fill="url(#poppyGrad)"/>
    <!-- Balloon-like highlight -->
    <ellipse cx="108" cy="45" rx="8" ry="6" fill="white" opacity="0.4"/>
    <!-- Center dot (tie point) -->
    <circle cx="120" cy="85" r="4" fill="#4A7C4A"/>
    <!-- Petal detail circles -->
    <circle class="petal-pulse" cx="105" cy="50" r="12" fill="#E63946" opacity="0.6"/>
    <circle class="petal-pulse" cx="135" cy="50" r="12" fill="#E63946" opacity="0.6"/>
    <circle cx="120" cy="40" r="10" fill="#E63946" opacity="0.5"/>
    <!-- Dark center -->
    <circle cx="120" cy="58" r="8" fill="#2D2D2D" opacity="0.7"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Orange tulip - center left -->
  <g class="flower-2">
    <path class="stem-2" d="M230 200 Q240 150, 225 110 Q218 90, 230 65" stroke="#7CB07C" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <ellipse class="leaf-sway" cx="238" cy="130" rx="10" ry="4" fill="#8FBC8F" transform="rotate(25 238 130)"/>
    <!-- Tulip head - balloon-like oval -->
    <ellipse cx="230" cy="42" r="22" ry="28" fill="url(#tulipGrad)"/>
    <!-- Highlight -->
    <ellipse cx="220" cy="32" rx="6" ry="8" fill="white" opacity="0.35"/>
    <!-- Tie point -->
    <circle cx="230" cy="68" r="3" fill="#4A7C4A"/>
    <!-- Petal lines -->
    <path d="M218 35 Q230 55, 242 35" stroke="#F77F00" stroke-width="1" fill="none" opacity="0.5"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Purple round flower - center -->
  <g class="flower-3">
    <path class="stem" d="M340 200 Q330 140, 345 100 Q355 70, 340 50" stroke="#7CB07C" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <ellipse class="leaf-sway" cx="332" cy="120" rx="9" ry="4" fill="#8FBC8F" transform="rotate(-20 332 120)"/>
    <ellipse class="leaf-sway" cx="352" cy="140" rx="7" ry="3" fill="#90BE90" transform="rotate(30 352 140)"/>
    <!-- Large balloon-like flower -->
    <circle cx="340" cy="28" r="26" fill="url(#purpleGrad)"/>
    <!-- Highlight -->
    <ellipse cx="328" cy="18" rx="7" ry="5" fill="white" opacity="0.4"/>
    <!-- Tie -->
    <circle cx="340" cy="52" r="4" fill="#4A7C4A"/>
    <!-- Decorative petals -->
    <circle class="petal-pulse" cx="320" cy="28" r="10" fill="#9B5DE5" opacity="0.7"/>
    <circle class="petal-pulse" cx="360" cy="28" r="10" fill="#9B5DE5" opacity="0.7"/>
    <circle cx="340" cy="12" r="8" fill="#9B5DE5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <!-- Center -->
    <circle cx="340" cy="30" r="6" fill="#F4A261"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Small teal bud - floating accent -->
  <g class="flower-6">
    <path d="M420 195 Q425 170, 418 155" stroke="#7CB07C" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <ellipse cx="418" cy="145" rx="10" ry="14" fill="url(#tealGrad)"/>
    <ellipse cx="413" cy="140" rx="3" ry="4" fill="white" opacity="0.3"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Blue flower - right side -->
  <g class="flower-4">
    <path class="stem-2" d="M490 200 Q500 150, 485 110 Q478 85, 490 60" stroke="#7CB07C" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <ellipse class="leaf-sway" cx="497" cy="135" rx="8" ry="3" fill="#8FBC8F" transform="rotate(35 497 135)"/>
    <!-- Balloon-round flower -->
    <circle cx="490" cy="38" r="24" fill="url(#blueGrad)"/>
    <ellipse cx="480" cy="28" rx="6" ry="5" fill="white" opacity="0.35"/>
    <circle cx="490" cy="60" r="3" fill="#4A7C4A"/>
    <!-- Petals -->
    <circle class="petal-pulse" cx="475" cy="35" r="9" fill="#457B9D" opacity="0.6"/>
    <circle class="petal-pulse" cx="505" cy="35" r="9" fill="#457B9D" opacity="0.6"/>
    <circle cx="490" cy="22" r="8" fill="#457B9D" opacity="0.5"/>
    <!-- Center -->
    <circle cx="490" cy="40" r="5" fill="#F4A261"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Gold wildflower - far right -->
  <g class="flower-5">
    <path class="stem" d="M580 200 Q570 155, 585 115 Q592 90, 580 65" stroke="#7CB07C" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <ellipse class="leaf-sway" cx="573" cy="140" rx="9" ry="4" fill="#90BE90" transform="rotate(-25 573 140)"/>
    <!-- Round flower head -->
    <circle cx="580" cy="42" r="25" fill="url(#goldGrad)"/>
    <ellipse cx="570" cy="32" rx="6" ry="5" fill="white" opacity="0.4"/>
    <circle cx="580" cy="65" r="3" fill="#4A7C4A"/>
    <!-- Radiating petals -->
    <circle class="petal-pulse" cx="560" cy="42" r="8" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.7"/>
    <circle class="petal-pulse" cx="600" cy="42" r="8" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.7"/>
    <circle cx="580" cy="25" r="7" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.6"/>
    <circle cx="580" cy="58" r="6" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.5"/>
    <!-- Center -->
    <circle cx="580" cy="42" r="7" fill="#E63946"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Floating small buds / confetti-like accents -->
  <g class="flower-6">
    <!-- Tiny coral bud -->
    <ellipse cx="65" cy="140" rx="6" ry="8" fill="#E63946" opacity="0.7"/>
    <line x1="65" y1="148" x2="65" y2="165" stroke="#7CB07C" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    
    <!-- Tiny purple bud -->
    <ellipse cx="175" cy="120" rx="5" ry="7" fill="#9B5DE5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <line x1="175" y1="127" x2="175" y2="140" stroke="#7CB07C" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    
    <!-- Tiny blue dot -->
    <circle cx="290" cy="95" r="4" fill="#457B9D" opacity="0.5"/>
    
    <!-- Tiny gold accent -->
    <circle cx="380" cy="110" r="5" fill="#F4A261" opacity="0.6"/>
    
    <!-- Tiny teal dot -->
    <circle cx="540" cy="100" r="4" fill="#2A9D8F" opacity="0.5"/>
    
    <!-- Floating leaf accents -->
    <ellipse cx="200" cy="175" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#8FBC8F" opacity="0.6" transform="rotate(-15 200 175)"/>
    <ellipse cx="450" cy="180" rx="5" ry="2.5" fill="#90BE90" opacity="0.5" transform="rotate(20 450 180)"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Extra tiny floating petals like confetti -->
  <circle cx="150" cy="85" r="3" fill="#E63946" opacity="0.4"/>
  <circle cx="310" cy="130" r="2.5" fill="#9B5DE5" opacity="0.35"/>
  <circle cx="520" cy="75" r="3" fill="#F77F00" opacity="0.4"/>
  <circle cx="610" cy="120" r="2" fill="#457B9D" opacity="0.35"/>
  
</svg>
description: This design transforms celebratory balloons into a floating garden of whimsical flower heads. Each bloom maintains the round, buoyant quality of balloons with radial gradients creating highlight spots like balloon shine. The stems curve gracefully like balloon strings, while small floating buds and petal dots serve as confetti accents throughout the negative space.
